label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. The question is about tracking who ends up with which present after a series of swaps. The answer is about what Claire has at the end. First, let me list out the initial presents: - Alice: pink ball - Bob: brown present - Claire: green present - Dave: red present - Eve: purple present Now, the swaps happen in a specific order. Let me go through each swap step by step and keep track of who has what after each swap. First swap: Claire and Bob swap. So Claire gives her green present to Bob, and Bob gives his brown present to Claire. Now: - Alice: pink - Bob: green - Claire: brown - Dave: red - Eve: purple Second swap: Claire and Dave swap. Claire has brown, Dave has red. After swapping: - Claire gives brown to Dave, Dave gives red to Claire. So now: - Alice: pink - Bob: green - Claire: red - Dave: brown - Eve: purple Third swap: Bob and Alice swap. Bob has green, Alice has pink. So they swap: - Bob gives green to Alice, Alice gives pink to Bob. Now: - Alice: green - Bob: pink - Claire: red - Dave: brown - Eve: purple Fourth swap: Alice and Eve swap. Alice has green, Eve has purple. Swap: - Alice gives green to Eve, Eve gives purple to Alice. Now: - Alice: purple - Bob: pink - Claire: red - Dave: brown - Eve: green Fifth swap: Dave and Alice swap. Dave has brown, Alice has purple. Swap: - Dave gives brown
